title: Fig. 1 in Species-level identification of trypanosomes infecting Australian wildlife by High-Resolution Melting - Real Time Quantitative Polymerase Chain Reaction (HRM-qPCR)
author: Keatley, S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Multiple sequence alignment of a portion of the 18S rDNA of seven Trypanosome species and subsequent genotypes used to design the HRM-qPCR assays.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Multiple sequence alignment of a portion of the 18S rDNA of seven Trypanosome species and subsequent genotypes used to design the HRM-qPCR assays.
